name: brave-new-mts
title: Brave New MTS
author: bits-orio
description: A remote-only, character-free layer for Multi-Team Support. Your character is removed, handcrafting and mining are gone, and you build entirely through a construction-robot network -- seeded at each team's spawn around a K2 Roboports roboport. Place blueprints; the bots do the rest.
